rounds: Purple Country Road bag to the food shop — self-talk caught live, did it anyway — that's a win and a half. Pink jockstrap to Balmoral Friday, changed in the men's change room — the choice counts even with the poncho on. Round lost: Apollo ring and necklace stayed home before work — pool nerves, ring size, pendant reading as obviously gay. Named clearly though, which is something.
pattern: They're loud in his own head before work and quiet once he's already out the door.
focus: This week's Internal Work challenge: catch joy police behaviour in the moment — not after. Especially around bag, jewellery, anything that isn't default.
